text: Final audit: testAllFull passed 450 JVM core, 447 Scala.js core, 30 JVM laws, 30 Scala.js laws, plus both full-optimized Scala.js test links. JVM and Scala.js API docs generated cleanly. Shared storage-identity tests on both targets prove exactly one source-to-builder copy, builder-to-result storage transfer, source/result non-aliasing, and correct strided traversal.
